---
name: Dataset connector
about: Request or design a new public-data connector
title: "[connector] "
labels: ["connector", "triage"]
---

**Data source**  
Name, public URL, license, and any registration requirements.

**API or bulk format**  
REST, GraphQL, SQL dump, S3, etc.

**What should normalize to**  
Which `Material` / property fields you need first (formula, structure, DFT energy, etc.).

**Milestones**  
MVP (read-only, small page size) vs full coverage.

**Notes**  
Link to any prior art (other OSS clients) or rate limits.
